description: Living formula for trade priority decisions. Engine reads this every run. Changes require live cert evidence.
lastTweakReason: Initial formula — hardcoded survival thresholds from Phase1.log observations

decisionLogic.step1_land: Detect settlement name, read market intel
decisionLogic.step2_survive: Check party inventory vs survivalFloor. Items below floor are MUST-BUY.
decisionLogic.step3_purchase: For each item: score = buyWeight * (1 - priceRatio). Buy top-scoring items until gold runs out or inventory full.
decisionLogic.step4_travel: Choose next town: prefer towns where sell prices are highest for overstocked items. If no clear winner, prefer nearest.
decisionLogic.step5_sell: At next town: sell items where sellPriority.profitMarginMin is met.

tweakHistory.reason: Initial formula. Survival floors derived from Phase1.log: charcoal 0 (need 2), hardwood 0 (need 4). No trade data yet.
tweakHistory.evidence: Phase1.log grep: party charcoal: x0 (low) floor=2, party hardwood: x0 (low) floor=4
